perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a young woman in a striped shirt drinking from a cup with a straw, showing an excited expression. (2) Scene transitions to a close-up of a hand holding a 7-Eleven frozen smoothie cup and a bottle of Yakult 1000 in a convenience store setting. (3) The camera shows a refrigerator shelf stocked with various fruit smoothie cups. (4) A hand picks a Yakult Y1000 bottle from the shelf. (5) The smoothie cup is shown being processed in a specialized 7-Eleven blending machine. (6) A hand pours the Yakult liquid into the blended purple smoothie. (7) A straw is used to stir the mixture until fully combined. (8) The woman reappears in the initial indoor setting, taking a sip and giving a enthusiastic thumbs-up to the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, high-energy Japanese J-pop/idol-style music begins with upbeat female vocals and heavy synthesizer percussion. (2) The music continues as the primary audio layer, with faint electronic beeps and ambient hum from the convenience store equipment occasionally audible in the background. (3) The upbeat tempo remains constant throughout the video, ending on a high note as the visuals conclude.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative: "日本7-11限定" (Japan 7-11 Limited) - High energy/Hook. (2) Decorative: "世界級喝法" (World-class way to drink) - Hyperbolic/Hook. (3) Functional: "7-11 Smoothie 巴西莓香蕉" (Acai Banana) - Descriptive. (4) Functional: "Yakult Y1000 養樂多" - Identifying the product. (5) Functional: "冰沙專用機 - 開始前記得掃條碼" (Smoothie machine - remember to scan barcode) - Instructional. (6) Functional: "完成後加入養樂多 - 會剛剛好滿杯" (Add Yakult after - it fits perfectly) - Instructional. (7) Functional: "攪拌就完成啦" (Stir and done) - Status update. (8) Decorative: "去日本一定要喝看看!!" (Must try in Japan!!) - Enthusiastic recommendation/Hook.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Step-by-step Demonstration -> Result and Recommendation

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main creator appearing in the intro and outro; her hands are visible in the middle segments.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Young East Asian woman with hair in pigtails, wearing a black-and-white horizontal striped t-shirt under black overalls.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Alternates between a domestic indoor room with white walls and a suitcase, and the interior of a brightly lit 7-Eleven store showing refrigerated shelves and a smoothie machine.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright indoor lighting, typical of a retail environment.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a lifestyle hack tutorial aimed at tourists or locals in Japan, teaching them how to customize a 7-Eleven smoothie by adding a specific brand of Yakult for a better taste or nutritional benefit. It leverages a trending audio track and fast-paced editing to create a sense of discovery and excitement.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator provides a positive review and a specific 'how-to' for the products, identifying them clearly.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-density vibrant text overlays, usage of Japanese idol-style background music, thumbs-up reaction shot.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: Typical user-generated content (UGC) aimed at social media platforms like Instagram Reels or TikTok, focusing on food and travel trends in Japan.
